title: pholidia eriocalyx
intro: Pholidia eriocalyx, a type of flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Australia, is also known as the "stinking iris" due to its distinctive unpleasant odor. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pholidia eriocalyx include relief from pain, fever reduction, and wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
